description_long: This is a high-backed wooden chair with a semi-enclosed, pentagonal rear structure, reminiscent of a traditional Gothic or ecclesiastical design. The backrest is tall and curves around the sitter, providing a sense of enclosure and privacy, with vertical black wooden supports and decorative finials at the top corners. The seat is broad and flat, with armrests extending forward and a solid, paneled front apron featuring geometric detailing. The wood appears dark-stained, with visible grain and a slightly worn, matte finish, while the black supports contrast with the brown panels. The rear of the chair is fully enclosed with vertical panels, giving it a robust and imposing appearance. This chair would likely serve as a statement or ceremonial piece in a public or semi-public urban setting, such as a park, plaza, or historical building.
description: A tall, semi-enclosed wooden chair with a pentagonal back, black vertical supports, and decorative finials. The seat is broad with armrests and a paneled front, giving it a robust, ceremonial look.
description_view_0: Side-rear view showing the tall, enclosed back with black vertical supports and finials, and the armrest extending forward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the broad seat, armrests, paneled front apron, and the open sitting area.
description_view_2: Opposite side-rear view, mirroring view 0, with the same tall back and armrest visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the fully enclosed, pentagonal back with three vertical black supports and four finials.
